# Source of truth: backend/pyproject.toml ([project.dependencies]).
# This list mirrors runtime deps only (no dev extras) and is consumed by:
#   - backend/Dockerfile
#   - .github/workflows/ci.yml
#
# When you change pyproject.toml, regenerate this file:
#   python -m piptools compile --no-emit-index-url -o requirements.txt pyproject.toml
# Or, for now, keep it manually in lockstep with [project.dependencies].
# =============================================================================
